title: Custom Discs
description: Play your own music in Minecraft jukeboxes
body:
## Custom Discs

Custom Discs lets you play **your own music** in Minecraft jukeboxes. Upload any
`.wav`, `.mp3` or `.ogg` file straight from an in-game screen, drop the disc in a
jukebox, and everyone nearby hears it — in sync, with full 3D positional audio.

No accounts, no external hosting, no URLs: every track is stored and streamed by
the server you're already playing on.

### Features

- **In-game upload** — pick a file with `/disc upload`, no config editing
- **3D positional audio**; works with Sound Physics Remastered
- **Synced for everyone** — all players in range hear the same track at the same moment
- **Server-side controls** — upload size limit, total storage cap, per-player file limit, cooldown, and a configurable permission level for every command
- **Client cache** with a size limit, plus an opt-out for players who don't want to receive audio

### Commands

- `/disc upload` — open the upload screen
- `/disc list` — list uploaded files with size and uploader
- `/disc delete <file>` — remove an uploaded file

### Requirements

NeoForge **21.1.x** for Minecraft **1.21.1**.
